selfServe.name: Census County boundaries (2010)
selfServe.usedBy: County areal linkage (CBP fallback) + TIGER road-proximity clip base
selfServe.license: US federal public domain — free to use and redistribute (cite the Census Bureau).

files.name: tl_2010_us_county10.zip
files.note: the single NATIONAL file (not the per-state tl_2010_{ss}_county10 in the same folder)

notes: Unzip; put the .shp in a subfolder named after the file basename, with its .shx/.dbf/.prj sidecars alongside.
No reprojection needed — the pipeline buffers/reprojects internally.

selfServe.name: Census Tract boundaries (2010)
selfServe.license: US federal public domain — free to use and redistribute.

files.name: tl_2010_{ss}_tract10.zip × 51
files.note: STATEWIDE files — 2-digit state FIPS (not the 5-digit per-county files)

notes: The TIGER2010/TRACT/2010/ folder lists BOTH per-county files (5-digit FIPS, e.g. tl_2010_06037_tract10.zip) and statewide files (2-digit FIPS, e.g. tl_2010_06_tract10.zip). Download the STATEWIDE (2-digit) ones — the pipeline expects tl_2010_{ss}_tract10.
No single national tract file — fetch all 51 statewide files (or just the states your cohort covers).
Unzip each into a subfolder named after the file basename (.shp + sidecars).

selfServe.name: Census ZCTA5 boundaries (2010)
selfServe.license: US federal public domain — free to use and redistribute.
notes: Unzip into a subfolder named after the file basename (.shp + sidecars).

selfServe.name: Census TIGER/Line roads
selfServe.usedBy: TIGER road proximity (distance to nearest road)
selfServe.license: US federal public domain — free to use and redistribute.

files.name: tl_{year}_{county_fips}_roads.zip
files.note: per county, per year — for the counties/years your cohort spans

notes: Road shapefiles live under each TIGER{year}/ROADS/ on the Census file server.
Place per-year road zips under data_full/TIGER/C4/tiger{year}_roads/ — the reader scans that directory.
Also needs the County boundaries (above) as a clip base.

selfServe.name: Census Block Group boundaries — 2010 + 2020 vintages
selfServe.usedBy: NDI + EPA Walkability areal linkages (block-group level)
selfServe.license: US federal public domain — free to use and redistribute.

files.name: tl_2024_{ss}_bg.zip × 51
files.note: 2020 vintage — or just run the bundled script

notes: Fastest for 2020: run `bash scripts/download_bg_2020_shapefiles.sh` from the repo root (idempotent).
For 2010, the TIGER2010/BG/2010/ folder has both 5-digit per-county and 2-digit statewide files — grab the statewide tl_2010_{ss}_bg10.
Join column differs: GEOID10 (2010) vs GEOID (2024). If your download exposes GEOID20, edit join_col in bg_us_2020_demo.yaml.

selfServe.name: Soundscape noise — L50 dBA (CONUS)
selfServe.sourceName: US National Park Service — Geospatial sound modeling (Mennitt et al.)
notes: Keep the exact filenames — the reader hard-codes all three.
Download only the CONUS_ files; skip the AK_/HI_ variants (different projections).
Provenance: project metadata labels this 'US DOT BTS', but the actual files are the NPS soundscape dataset.

selfServe.name: USGS NHDPlus High Resolution — National Release 2
selfServe.size: ~29 GB zipped, ~61 GB unzipped (budget ~90 GB free disk)
notes: Direct link: prd-tnm.s3.amazonaws.com/StagedProducts/Hydrography/NHDPlusHR/National/GDB/NHDPlus_H_National_Release_2_GDB.zip
Unzip to the .gdb directory (keep its name) — no conversion needed.

selfServe.name: VIIRS Nighttime Lights — VNL v2.1 (2013–2019)
selfServe.sourceName: NOAA / Colorado School of Mines — Earth Observation Group (EOG)
selfServe.license: Free for research/education; redistributable with attribution.

files.name: VNL_v21_npp_{year}_global_*.average_masked.dat.tif.gz
files.note: one per year 2013–2019; choose the 'average_masked' variant

notes: Requires a free EOG account (login) to download the annual global files.
gunzip each .tif.gz after download; keep the original filenames (the reader parses the year).

selfServe.name: KNMI TEMIS UV — daily UV index / dose (2013–2019)

files.name: {var}YYYYMMDD.hdf
files.note: 4 variables (uvief, uvdec, uvdvc, uvddc) — one file per day

notes: Native HDF-4 — install pyhdf (+ the system HDF4 library) to read it.
Scriptable from the CloudFront mirror: d1qb6yzwaaq4he.cloudfront.net/uvradiation/v2.0/{year}/{mm}/{var}YYYYMMDD.hdf
Layout: one subfolder per variable, then per year.

preset.name: Neighborhood Deprivation Index (NDI)
preset.origin: Built from Census ACS 5-year via an xgboost model — no public download.

preset.name: Community Organization Density (CBP / ZBP)
preset.origin: Derived from Census County / ZIP Business Patterns (raw CBP/ZBP are public).

preset.name: EPA Walkability Index
preset.origin: Converted from the EPA Smart Location Database (raw SLD is public).

preset.name: USDA Food Access (FARA)
preset.origin: Interpolated from USDA ERS Food Access Research Atlas (raw FARA is public).
